title: Materials and techniques (quiz)
description: Test your comprehension of the different mediums that artists use.

assessment_items.question_content:
**In tempera painting, artists used a $\_\_\_\_\_$ technique to create shadows.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: With tempera paint, artists use hatching—small, closely spaced lines to create deeper tones for shadows.

assessment_items.question_content:
**In tempera painting, wooden panels were prepared with $\_\_\_\_\_$, which prevented the wood from absorbing the paint.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: In tempera painting, wooden panels were prepared with gesso to prevent the wood from absorbing the paint.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Woodcuts were very expensive and didn't allow artists to make many prints.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Woodcuts were inexpensive and allowed artists to make many prints, unlike engraving.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Artists in the Middle Ages didn't cast large bronze sculptures very often, but the use of bronze was revived during the $\_\_\_\_\_\_$.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Artists in the Middle Ages didn't cast large bronze sculptures very often, but the use of bronze was revived during the Renaissance.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Unlike tempera, oil paint can be . . . **

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Oil paint can be translucent and very fluid, so that long brushstrokes are possible.
Oil paint can be mixed with Damar varnish and/or linseed oil.
Oil paint can be mixed with other colors on a palette or directly on the canvas. "All of the above" is the correct answer.

choices.content: more fluid, so that long brush strokes are possible.
mixed with Damar varnish and/or linseed oil.
mixed with other colors on a palette or directly on the canvas.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Roman artists made marble copies of Greek sculpture made of $\_\_\_\_\_$ .**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Roman artists made marble copies of bronze Greek sculptures.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Before the modern era, blocks of marble were normally transported by water.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Water was the easiest way to transport heavy blocks of marble over great distances.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Engraving is done by drawing on a smooth metal plate with a sharp instrument called a burin. **

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Engraving is a lot like drawing, but the tools are different. Engraving is done by drawing on a smooth metal plate with a sharp instrument called a burin.
